title: Cif Cleanboost Kitchen Spray 100% tough grease removal for cleaning ceramic, chrome and enamel surfaces 700 ml
features: Cif Cleanboost Kitchen Spray removes 100% of tough grease on kitchen surfaces
This kitchen spray is suitable for food preparation areas and suitable for cleaning ceramic, chrome, and enamel surfaces
Enriched with orange and tangerine oils, our cleaning spray quickly lifts away tough grease and grime, leaving surfaces sparkling with a zesty finish
Our kitchen degreaser has a formulation that is tough on dirt and kind for your home
Cif Cleanboost Kitchen Spray leaves your kitchen surfaces with a 100% streak-free shine
Cif Cleanboost Kitchen Degreaser can be used on multiple surfaces such as hob, BBQ, Extractor fan and Oven
description: Product Description Keep your kitchen shiny clean with Cif Cleanboost Kitchen Spray. Powered by Cleanboost, it quickly lifts away 100% of tough grease for an unbeatable streak-free finish, making the busiest room in the house beautifully clean. Our lightweight formula, which contains orange and tangerine oils, cuts through grease in just one wipe. You will be left with perfectly shiny surfaces and a kitchen invigorated with zesty cheer. Enjoy a streak-free shine on ceramic, chrome, and enamel surfaces – first time, every time. It's an excellent kitchen cleaner for hobs and cooker hoods too. Our kitchen degreaser is suitable for food preparation areas. For beautiful cleaning results every time, spray onto the surface, leave for a few seconds and wipe with a cloth. For tough dirt, leave for a few minutes before wiping clean. For a sparkling home, also try Cif Cleanboost Bathroom Cleaner Spray to quickly lift away 100% of grime and limescale, and Cif Power & Shine Antibacterial Spray to eliminate 99.99% of germs. At Cif, we believe in revealing and protecting beauty for everyone to enjoy, every day. That’s why for over 50 years, Cif has developed cleaning products that remove ugly dirt, without damage – giving beautiful results. Ingredients <5 % Non-ionic Surfactant, Perfume, Limonene, Phenoxyethanol Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. If eye irritation persists: Get medical advice/attention. WARNING Causes serious eye irritation. WARNING Causes serious eye irritation. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever House Springfield Drive Leatherhead Kt22 7Gr See more
